svg.title: Complete journey, all nine phases, ingestion gateway removed — Dataflow produces directly to Kafka
svg.desc: Ingestion gateway removed. The Dataflow pull pipeline now handles validation, Confluent wire-format wrapping, and direct Kafka produce. Proto descriptor and source topic remain producer prerequisites shown with dashed borders.

g.text: same resource, not a new one

svg.text: PHASE 7 — HOT PATH, DATAFLOW UNIVERSAL (continuous) · PHASE 8 — DATA PRODUCER MONITORING PORTAL

g.text: Pub/Sub or Kafka, owned by producer
bookmarked; search by id or name

svg.text: PHASE 9 — CONSUMER ACCESS (fed by Knowledge Catalog above)
gray = external · blue = Cloud Run · purple = GCP Workflows · teal = GCP-managed infra
T1 = top priority (green) · T2 = second priority (amber) · T3 = last (slate)
amber = new resource, created only per access grant, never speculatively · dashed border = prerequisite the platform cannot provision
kafka, pub/sub, and GraphQL grants write an access record back to Knowledge Catalog — direct access is already tracked there natively
